programme.title: Live UEFA Champions League
programme.sub-title: Live UCL: Juventus v Sporting CP
programme.desc: Juventus v Sporting Lisbon (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the league phase match from Allianz Stadium. The host's one and only home game in this competition so far ended in a thrilling 4-4 draw against Borussia Dortmund. The game was only 0-0 at half-time before the goals flowed in the second half, with the Italian side scoring two goals in stoppage time to come from 4-2 down to earn a point
